title: Theophilos #2321
definition:
Theophilus = "friend of God"

 1) the person to whom Luke addressed his Gospel and the book of Acts
nasbUsage:
Definition: Theophilus = "friend of God"

 1) the person to whom Luke addressed his Gospel and the book of Acts

    NASB:  friend of God, Theophilus, the addressee of Luke and Acts:
